name: Kool-Aid Pickles
recipeIngredient: 2 packets red Kool-Aid (such as cherry flavored)
recipeInstructions:
Kool-Aid Pickles
Start to finish: 2 days, or longer if you want
Makes: A 46-ounce jar of pickles
1. Empty the contents of a 46-ounce (1 quart, 14 ounces) jar of whole dill pickles into a bowl.
2. Discard the juice from the pickle jar.
3. Cut each pickle in half lengthwise.
4. Return the pickles to the jar.
5. In a large measuring cup, combine the sugar, water, and Kool-Aid. Mix until the sugar has completely dissolved.
6. Pour the liquid into the pickle jar, ensuring that all the pickles are covered.
7. Cover the jar and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
